hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ac = Join-Path $env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR '_artifacts/_home/active-context.md'; Write-Output '# Home-base continuity + gate (auto-injected at SessionStart)'; if (Test-Path $ac) { Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 $ac }; Write-Output ''; Write-Output 'ARTIFACTS GATE: no edits outside _artifacts/ without an approved implementation_plan.md (see AGENTS.md section 3). GIT: hand Daniel the exact command; never commit/push yourself unless he delegates it in the moment (git-policy).'"
